0.original: Ask yourself every day, what can I do today to make my wife and family happy?
0.b1: Ask yourself every day: How can I make my wife and family happy today?
0.cn: 每天问问自己：今天我能做些什么让我的妻子和家人开心？
0.ai_notes: 'Ask yourself': to think about a question deeply in your own mind.
0.remarks: 'Ask yourself': 自问，指在内心深处对某个问题进行思考。

1.original: This may seem almost too simple, but it is amazingly effective.
1.b1: This sounds very simple, but it works very well.
1.cn: 这看起来似乎太简单了，但它却出奇地有效。
1.ai_notes: 'Amazingly effective': working very well in a surprising way.
1.remarks: 'Amazingly effective': 惊人地有效，指以令人惊讶的方式发挥出极好的作用。

2.original: One evening, as part of a sales training program, I was discussing building the home environment for selling success.
2.b1: One evening, I was teaching a sales class about how a happy home helps you succeed at work.
2.cn: 一天晚上，在一场销售培训课程中，我正在讨论如何营造有利于销售成功的家庭环境。
2.ai_notes: 'Sales training program': a course designed to teach people how to sell products better.
2.remarks: 'Sales training program': 销售培训课程，旨在教授人们如何更好地推销产品的课程。

3.original: To illustrate a point, I asked the salesmen, who were all married, when was the last time,
3.b1: To explain my point, I asked the married salesmen a question.
3.cn: 为了说明一个观点，我问那些已婚的推销员们。
3.ai_notes: 'To illustrate a point': to give an example that helps explain an idea.
3.remarks: 'To illustrate a point': 为了说明观点，通过举例来帮助解释某个想法。

4.original: aside from Christmas, your wedding anniversary, or her birthday, that you surprised your wife with a special gift?
4.b1: Besides Christmas, your anniversary, or her birthday, when was the last time you gave your wife a surprise gift?
4.cn: 除了圣诞节、结婚纪念日或她的生日之外，你上一次给妻子送惊喜礼物是什么时候？
4.ai_notes: 'Aside from': except for or apart from. 'Wedding anniversary': the yearly celebration of the date a couple got married.
4.remarks:
'Aside from': 除了……之外，表示排除或另外的情况。
'Wedding anniversary': 结婚纪念日，夫妻结婚日期的年度庆祝活动。

5.original: Even I was shocked at the answers.
5.b1: I was surprised by their answers.
5.cn: 连我自己都被他们的回答震惊了。
5.ai_notes: 'Shocked': feeling very surprised or upset by something unexpected.
5.remarks: 'Shocked': 震惊的，因突发事件感到非常惊讶或心烦意乱。

6.original: Of the thirty-five salesmen, only one had surprised his wife in the past month.
6.b1: Out of thirty-five salesmen, only one had given his wife a surprise gift in the last month.
6.cn: 在三十五名推销员中，只有一个在过去的一个月里给妻子准备过惊喜。
6.ai_notes: 'Of the': used to show a part of a larger group.
6.remarks: 'Of the': ……的，用于表示属于更大群体的一部分。

7.original: Many of the group answered, between three and six months, and over a third said, I can't remember.
7.b1: Many said it had been three to six months, and over a third said they could not remember.
7.cn: 许多人回答说是在三到六个月前，超过三分之一的人说他们记不清了。
7.ai_notes: 'Over a third': more than one out of every three people.
7.remarks: 'Over a third': 超过三分之一，指比例超过三个人中的一个。

8.ai_notes: 'Imagine!': a word used to show surprise or to ask someone to think about a situation.
8.remarks: 'Imagine!': 想象一下！，用于表达惊讶或邀请对方设想某种情境。

9.original: And some men wonder why their wives no longer treat them like Mr. King with a crown.
9.b1: Some men wonder why their wives do not treat them like a king anymore.
9.cn: 有些男人还纳闷为什么他们的妻子不再像对待国王一样对待他们了。
9.ai_notes: 'Mr. King with a crown': a metaphor for being treated with great respect and importance.
9.remarks: 'Mr. King with a crown': 戴皇冠的国王先生，比喻受到极大的尊重和重视。

10.original: I wanted to impress these salesmen with the power of the thoughtful gift.
10.b1: I wanted to show these men that a thoughtful gift is very powerful.
10.cn: 我想让这些推销员们明白一份贴心礼物的力量。
10.ai_notes: 'Impress': to make someone feel admiration for you. 'Thoughtful gift': a present chosen with care to show you care about someone.
10.remarks:
'Impress': 给……留下深刻印象，使人感到钦佩。
'Thoughtful gift': 用心的礼物，精心挑选以表达关怀的礼物。

11.original: The next evening, I arranged to have a florist appear just before the close of the session.
11.b1: The next evening, I invited a florist to come to our class.
11.cn: 第二天晚上，我安排了一位花商在课程结束前赶到。
11.ai_notes: 'Florist': a person who sells flowers. 'Close of the session': the end of a meeting or class.
11.remarks:
'Florist': 花商，卖花的人。
'Close of the session': 会议或课程结束时。

12.original: I introduced him and leveled with them.
12.b1: I introduced him and spoke honestly to the group.
12.cn: 我向大家介绍了这位花商，并诚恳地对他们说了实话。
12.ai_notes: 'Leveled with': to speak honestly and openly with someone.
12.remarks: 'Leveled with': 对某人坦诚相待，指开诚布公地交流。

13.original: I want each of you to discover what a little unexpected remembrance will do to build a better home environment.
13.b1: I want you to see how a small, unexpected gift can make your home life better.
13.cn: 我希望你们每个人都能发现，一点点意想不到的关怀将如何改善家庭氛围。
13.ai_notes: 'Unexpected remembrance': a small gift or gesture given when it is not a special holiday.
13.remarks: 'Unexpected remembrance': 意外的纪念礼物，指非节日期间赠送的小礼物或心意。

14.original: I've arranged with the florist for each of you to get a fine,
14.b1: I have arranged for each of you to buy a beautiful,
14.cn: 我已经和花商商量好，让你们每人都能买到一朵精美的、
14.ai_notes: 'Arranged': to plan or organize something in advance.
14.remarks: 'Arranged': 安排，指提前计划或组织某事。

15.original: long-stemmed red rose for just fifty cents.
15.b1: long-stemmed red rose for only fifty cents.
15.cn: 长茎红玫瑰，只需五十美分。
15.ai_notes: 'Long-stemmed': having a long, thin stalk, often used to describe high-quality roses.
15.remarks: 'Long-stemmed': 长茎的，常用来形容花茎修长的高品质玫瑰。

16.original: Now, if you don't have fifty cents, or if you think your wife isn't worth that,
16.b1: If you do not have fifty cents, or if you do not think your wife is worth it,
16.cn: 现在，如果你没有五十美分，或者如果你觉得你的妻子不值得你花这笔钱，
16.ai_notes: 'Worth that': having a value equal to the cost of the item.
16.remarks: 'Worth that': 值那个价，指物品的价值与成本相等。

17.original: " they laughed, "'I'll buy the flower for her myself.
17.b1: I will buy the flower for her myself, I joked.
17.cn: 我就亲自为她买这朵花，我开玩笑说。
17.ai_notes: 'I'll buy the flower for her myself': a humorous way to challenge someone to show affection.
17.remarks: 'I'll buy the flower for her myself': 我会亲自为她买花，一种幽默的说法，用来挑战对方表达爱意。

18.original: All I ask is that you take the rose to your wife, and then tomorrow evening tell us what happened.
18.b1: Just take the rose home to your wife and tell us what happened tomorrow.
18.cn: 我只要求你们把玫瑰带给妻子，明天晚上告诉我们发生了什么。
18.ai_notes: 'All I ask': a phrase used to state a simple requirement.
18.remarks: 'All I ask': 我唯一的请求，用于陈述一个简单的要求。

19.original: Don't, of course, tell her how you came to purchase this rose for her." They understood.
19.b1: Do not tell her how you got the flower. They understood.
19.cn: 当然，别告诉她你是怎么买到这朵花的。他们都明白了。
19.ai_notes: 'How you came to purchase': the story or reason behind why you bought something.
19.remarks: 'How you came to purchase': 你购买的缘由，指购买某物背后的故事或原因。

20.original: Without exception, every fellow testified the next evening that the mere investment of 50 cents had made his wife happy.
20.b1: The next evening, everyone said that spending 50 cents made their wives very happy.
20.cn: 第二天晚上，每个人都证实，仅仅投入50美分就让他们的妻子感到非常幸福。
20.ai_notes: 'Without exception': every single person did the same thing. 'Testified': to give a report or account of what happened.
20.remarks:
'Without exception': 无一例外，指每个人都做了同样的事。
'Testified': 作证，指对发生的事情进行陈述或报告。
